thread.title: Loop Engineering
thread.definitionDraft: A developer workflow pattern built around repeated agent planning, code or tool execution, verification, and feedback inside coding-agent environments such as Claude Code.
thread.useBoundary: Evidence pack only; no schema, production data, or route changes. Financial and IR materials are company_strategy_context candidates only and do not count toward topic-page readiness.

sources.title: Boris Cherny X post on Claude Code workflow
sources.whyRelevant: Direct Boris Cherny signal that Claude Code value depends on user-created workflow, matching the loop-engineering framing.
sources.evidenceQuote: There is no one correct way to use Claude Code.
sources.reviewNotes: Use only as signal. X availability and full-context retrieval should be rechecked before page publish.
sources.text:

sources.title: The Rise of Loop Engineering
sources.whyRelevant: Practitioner vocabulary source for the phrase and for the plan-generate-review-refine loop pattern.
sources.evidenceQuote: Loop engineering treats AI work as an iterative process.
sources.reviewNotes: Useful for terminology, but secondary. Do not let it override official Anthropic definitions.
sources.text:
The Rise of Loop Engineering

Practitioner vocabulary source for the phrase and for the plan-generate-review-refine loop pattern.

Evidence note: Loop engineering treats AI work as an iterative process.

Useful for terminology, but secondary. Do not let it override official Anthropic definitions.

edges.evidenceNote: Boris frames Claude Code around custom workflow; docs formalize common workflows.
Agentic coding practice maps to interleaved reasoning and actions.
Claude Code tool behavior sits on the broader tool-use foundation.
Real coding workflows require real repository issue benchmarks.
Programmable Claude Code sessions can connect to tool execution surfaces.
Hook schemas and examples show deterministic checkpoints around agent loops.
Subagents support delegated exploration and task-specific workflow loops.
The GitHub workflow turns coding-agent loops into PR and issue automation.

weakSources.reason: X access can be unstable; keep as signal only.
Transcript text must be re-captured before page-ready quotes.
Recent paper; verify review status and scope.
Use only after checking the exact example file or snippet that will be rendered.

thinSpots: The phrase Loop Engineering is practitioner vocabulary, not an official Anthropic term.
Transcript candidates require final transcript capture before rendered quotes.
Company strategy materials are excluded from topic-page readiness and should route to company pages.
